citation.site: Owner-relayed forum post: Sony 24mm f/1.4 GM astigmatism report (A7IV + A7RIV)

use_case.evidence: Files shared publicly via Drive link by the author for diagnosis; owner directed the pull 2026-07-09 late. Original post: heavy astigmatism at frame edge (present in center) wide open f/1.4, persistent to f/2.8; elongated stars stretching TOWARD frame center even at 2s exposures; worse on A7RIV than A7IV.

citation.terms: Diagnostic use; do not republish images without author attribution once known.
citation.owner_authorization: owner supplied links + quote 2026-07-09 late; measurement study intended ('we will judge' the claimed-good frame)
